projects.project_context_note: Single building used to test finishing, handover defects, and overlapping painting responsibility.
Building A is in finishing/handover; Building B is in foundation/early structural work.
Renovation and inspection project with studios, apartments, moisture defects, and cross-trade observations.

companies.company_note: Main builder / site management; reporter employer for inspectors and supervisors.
Main painting contractor for Alppila.
Small handover correction company for apartment-level paint defects.
Plumbing contractor used across several projects.
Electrical contractor; also temporary site power in foundation phase.
Bathroom and floor tile works.
Sealing, bathroom silicone, waterproofing details.
Final cleaning and site cleaning.
Door/window adjustments, balcony doors, handles.
Painting contractor for Tuira Building A.
Ventilation and HVAC checks.
Crane and lifting works on foundation/structural sites.
Excavation, trenches, soil and drainage related work.
Piling and foundation pile works.
Concrete, slab, reinforcement, early structural work.
Steel beams and structural steel.
Temporary safety, guardrails, edge protection.
Renovation coordination and general renovation work.
Painting and surface correction for renovation projects.
Floor scratches, laminate, loose floor works.
Windows, balcony doors, seals, handles.
Moisture inspection, waterproofing checks, moisture damage.

users.persona_note: Inspector for Alppila; can report any issue and confirm company suggestion.
Electrical worker; useful for testing reporting outside own trade.
Painting foreman; reporter employer may match painting cases but should not decide alone.
Cleaning supervisor; can notice finishing and safety issues during handover.
Crane operator in Building B foundation zone; can report non-crane issues.
Inspector across Tuira; active project contains buildings in different phases.
Site supervisor; broad access in Tuira, but one active project at a time.
Electrical worker active in both Building A finishing and Building B temporary power context.
Quality inspector in renovation and inspection project.
Electrical worker; tests reporting plumbing/moisture/painting defects outside own trade.
Plumbing technician; can report own trade or other renovation defects.
Renovation supervisor; can confirm suggestions for broad renovation cases.

areas.area_note: Default context for Floor 3 handover defects.

spoken_location_examples: A305 living room; apartment A305; A three zero five living room
floor two; second floor; A floor two

areas.area_note: Building B is in foundation phase.

spoken_location_examples: north trench; foundation trench; trench on north side
studio S204; S204; studio two zero four
floor two; second floor; B floor two

projectCompanyContext.agreement_scope: Whole-building painting and surface finishing
projectCompanyContext.note_count_interpretation: High note count mainly reflects whole-building scope and long active period.
projectCompanyContext.candidate_match_note: Candidate when issue is general painting/finishing or no specific correction contractor is more precise.
projectCompanyContext.trigger_keywords_en_fi: paint damage; wall scratch; repaint; maalivaurio; seinänaarmu; uudelleenmaalaus

projectCompanyContext.agreement_scope: Small apartment-level paint correction during handover
projectCompanyContext.note_count_interpretation: Lower total count than main painter but very relevant for Floor 3 small paint corrections.
projectCompanyContext.candidate_match_note: Candidate when Floor 3 apartment-level paint damage is mentioned during handover.
projectCompanyContext.trigger_keywords_en_fi: paint damage; small repair; handover correction; A305; maalivaurio; viimeistelykorjaus

projectCompanyContext.agreement_scope: Bathroom and kitchen plumbing, leaks, water fixtures
projectCompanyContext.note_count_interpretation: Notes mostly relate to leaks, drains, and fixtures across all apartments.
